commands.summary: Schema migration to v8 (the existing version-upgrade test now asserts schemaVersion === 8 with a pre-migration backup and no data loss). New test: contact metadata (company/role/tags/notes/pinned/favorite) round-trips; upsert creates a primary phone contact point; multiple labeled numbers/emails with a re-assignable primary; resolveContactIdByValue finds known values and returns null for unknown; contact policy persists with trusted level, and unknown contacts default to no approval/urgent privileges; delete removes the contact and its points/policy.
Full suite green after the schema bump — existing messaging, data-safety, and renderer tests unaffected.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 3 DATA FOUNDATION. A transactional, backed-up v8 migration adds contact metadata columns, a contact_points table (multiple labeled numbers/emails with one primary, backfilled for existing contacts), and a contact_policy table, plus the backend methods (updateContact, deleteContact, contact-point CRUD, resolveContactIdByValue, get/setContactPolicy). CLV-009/010/011 remain PENDING: the server API endpoints, the renderer contact-editing UI (CLV-009 create/edit/delete metadata + tests), unknown-inbound attach/new/ignore/block handling (CLV-010), and attention-policy enforcement of blocked/muted (CLV-011) are the remaining slices. No criterion is marked satisfied yet.
